---
title: "A few of my favorite things"
author: "Alex Hurtado Desaulniers"
output: html_notebook
---

Include 4 items or hobbies that are your favorite and then include an emoji at the bottom!
Example:

My Unordered List:

 - Books and Reading
 - Yarn and Crocheting 
 - Bikes and MTB
 - Modding controllers and Playing Videogames

🍴
